name: data sources: every data source is tier 1 and applies to cloud-architecture
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'Encoding.default_external=Encoding::UTF_8; r=ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"]; d=YAML.unsafe_load_file(r+"/standards/data-architecture-sources.yaml"); exit(d.all?{|e| e["tier"]==1 && (e["applies_to"]||[]).include?("cloud-architecture")} ? 0 : 1)' && echo data-tier1 1>&2
